title: Ep24 My Head Hurts
wikitext:
[]: Ep:24, My Head Hurts             Quote Post by EvaCub » Sat Sep 29, 2007 10:16 am Okay so I just finished rewatching episode 24 and noticed i missed something that I should have noticed... maybe the first 30 times I watched it What the Hell Is that! It's another A.T. Field, as strong as we've ever detected! It's shutting down Everything! a little bit later What's that! It's another A.T. Field, Its strong as the first one as appeared around terminal dogma!? He's right it's breaking through the other A.T. Field! What Is it another angel? I dont know, I can't confirm it!

[]: Re: Ep:24, My Head Hurts             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Sep 29, 2007 10:18 am EvaCub wrote: Is it Rei's?

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Sat Sep 29, 2007 10:27 am o, dang thats right If this becomes a dead topic my bad

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sat Sep 29, 2007 12:02 pm so its generally agreed that neither of the AT fields come from Lilith?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Sep 29, 2007 12:03 pm Don't feel too bad---when I first watched the series, I didn't realize that the Rei in that scene was our Rei (Rei 3) and instead thought it had something to do with Quantum Physics Rei 3/Lilith, aka Bookend Rei. @ Slothen: Um.... Episode 24' wrote: Shinji: What's that?! Misato: What's the situation? HYUGA: It's an AT Field! AOBA: The same kind of AT Field that we saw earlier has developed near the barrier around Terminal Dogma! IBUKI: It's entering the barrier! Misato: It can't be! Another Angel?! AOBA: It's no good! We can't confirm that! Oh, no, it disappeared! Misato: Disappeared?! The Angel did?!

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Sep 29, 2007 12:37 pm slothen wrote: so its generally agreed that neither of the AT fields come from Lilith?

[]:             Quote Post by King_Panther13 » Sat Sep 29, 2007 1:49 pm I did always thought that it was Rei, but with this thread, I'm kinda thinking...what if Rei was just acting as harbringer of death, as she did in EoE? Kaworu probably thought "Oh snap, I'ma die, I just saw her" and then gave up or something. Though I used to always think Rei was just expanding and then closing her AT field to help out Shinji...it's just, I Think that's something else to chew on.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Sep 29, 2007 1:57 pm She was neutralizing Kaworu's AT Field to stop him.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sat Sep 29, 2007 4:30 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Sat Sep 29, 2007 5:20 pm King_Panther13 wrote: I always thought that it was Rei, but with this thread, I'm kinda thinking...what if Rei was just acting as harbinger of death, as she did in EoE? Kaworu probably thought "Oh snap, I'ma die, I just saw her" and then gave up or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Sep 29, 2007 6:51 pm 7th-chan wrote: For some unknown reason, that particular scene always scared the shi* out of me. Rei looks weird and creepy here.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Sep 29, 2007 8:31 pm 7th-chan wrote: For some unknown reason, that particular scene always scared the shi* out of me. Rei looks weird and creepy here.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sat Sep 29, 2007 8:34 pm I think that's supposed to be the corner of her jaw, not her chin.

[]:             Quote Post by Avatar of Dreams » Sat Sep 29, 2007 8:38 pm This picture of Rei freaked me out the most. :twisted:

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Sun Sep 30, 2007 4:46 pm the_seventh_child wrote: Sailor Star Dust wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Sep 30, 2007 4:52 pm Interestingly enough, this pic of Rei is from the DC version of Episode 24, not the on-air version. Maybe she's meant to look spooky while doing her AT Field stuff?

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun Sep 30, 2007 7:06 pm yeah, with the mouth being where it is.. something is off. i noticed it just now though, and never in the times i'd watched it.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Sep 30, 2007 9:15 pm Stardust, I'm pretty sure that pic is in the OA as well.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Sep 30, 2007 9:36 pm It is, but Rei's expression looks different. For another example, compare the OA scene of Rei breaking Gendou's glasses in 23 to the DC version of it (her expression is cold in the DC version). Apparently such changes were done for things in EoE to make more sense.
